source: RMC-BestFit/src/RMC.BestFit/Analyses/DistributionFitting/FittingAnalysis.cs @ fc28c0c -- A10 LOOSE smoke oracle. FittingAnalysis fits the 14 ported candidate distributions (GeneralizedNormal is skipped -- factory has no case; 15 -> 14) by MLE over an exact-only frame. The GoF metrics come from the seeded DifferentialEvolution optimizer (fixed default prng_seed), so they are deterministic and reproduce bit-identically across C++/R/Python (identical compiled core). Values here are SELF-COMPUTED from the C++ runner and given LOOSE rel tolerances; A11's emitter may tighten them against the real C# FittingAnalysis. candidate_count is an exact structural invariant (14).
